'''dahofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swallie|swallie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swallie|swallie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dahofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæhefeth|dæhefeth]] || [[word:dæhefej|dæhefej]] || [[word:dæhefesh|dæhefesh]] || [[word:dæhefe|dæhefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahohofoth|dahohofoth]] || [[word:dahohofoj|dahohofoj]] || [[word:dahohofosh|dahohofosh]] || [[word:dahohofo|dahohofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahofoth|dahofoth]] || [[word:dahofoj|dahofoj]] || [[word:dahofosh|dahofosh]] || [[word:dahofo|dahofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahoffoth|dahoffoth]] || [[word:dahoffoj|dahoffoj]] || [[word:dahoffosh|dahoffosh]] || [[word:dahoffof|dahoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dahofotho|dahofotho]] || [[word:dahofojo|dahofojo]] || [[word:dahofosho|dahofosho]] || [[word:dahofoko|dahofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dahofoth|dahofoth]] || [[word:dahofoj|dahofoj]] || [[word:dahofosh|dahofosh]] || [[word:dahofo|dahofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dahofothol|dahofothol]] || [[word:dahofojol|dahofojol]] || [[word:dahofoshol|dahofoshol]] || [[word:dahofokol|dahofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dahofothotho|dahofothotho]] || [[word:dahofojojo|dahofojojo]] || [[word:dahofoshosho|dahofoshosho]] || [[word:dahofoko|dahofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dahofothon|dahofothon]] || [[word:dahofojon|dahofojon]] || [[word:dahofoshon|dahofoshon]] || [[word:dahofokon|dahofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dahofothoro|dahofothoro]] || [[word:dahofojoro|dahofojoro]] || [[word:dahofoshoro|dahofoshoro]] || [[word:dahofokoro|dahofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
